positive: A playful, retro-futuristic cartoon scene of a badger wearing an astronaut helmet, sitting at a diner counter serving space shakes. Vibrant 1950s cartoon style, halftone dots, bold outlines, exaggerated proportions, atomic age aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, realistic shadows
